treatment_information.treatment_response: Initial improvement in neutropenic cycles, later refractory with shortened cycles and continued infections
Continued vulnerability to infections during nadirs

treatment_information.specific_treatment: Allogeneic bone marrow hematopoietic stem cell transplant
treatment_information.treatment_response: Engraftment confirmed by day +14, 100% donor chimerism at 2 months

treatment_information.specific_treatment: Conditioning chemotherapy (cyclophosphamide, fludarabine, anti-thymocyte globulin, low dose total body irradiation)

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 120 to 150 mg BID, goal trough level 200-250

treatment_information.treatment_response: Responded to engraftment syndrome with mild tachypnea and generalized rash

treatment_information.specific_treatment: Steroids, calcineurin inhibitors, cellcept, budesonide, infliximab
treatment_information.treatment_response: Grade IV GI GvHD progressed despite treatment

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Due to perforation of the cecum

treatment_timeline.event: Diagnosed with CyN at age one
Underwent testing for ELANE mutation and Periodic Fever Syndromes Panel
Discharged from hospital with no evidence of GvHD
Admitted with severe diarrhea, diagnosed with grade IV GI GvHD
Patient died of respiratory failure and septic shock

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Initially seen weekly, then every two weeks for normal follow-up appointments until day +53
patient_outcome.complications: Neutropenic fever, engraftment syndrome, grade IV GI GvHD, pneumatosis cystoids intestinalis, acute serositis, focal microperforation, perforation of the cecum, respiratory failure, septic shock
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: Engrafted by day +14, discharged by day +20
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Deteriorating prior to transplant, initially improved post-transplant but later severe complications
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Voiced unhappiness due to deteriorating quality of life prior to transplant
